datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.note: Simplified version for a learning project — not a legally binding statement.
datenschutz.intro: LangCards is a non-commercial learning project. Personal data is processed only to the extent necessary.
datenschutz.data: On registration: email, username and password (stored encrypted). On Google login: Google ID, email, name and profile picture.
datenschutz.purpose: The data is used solely for the user account, authentication and the flashcard features.
datenschutz.third: Some features use third-party providers (e.g. Google login, email delivery, file upload). Data may be transmitted to these providers.
datenschutz.rights: You can delete your account at any time — your data is then removed. You have the right to access, correction and deletion.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: LangCards is a non-commercial learning project. Its sole purpose is to demonstrate my web development skills.
terms.purpose: This application is a portfolio and learning project. It showcases the functionality of a flashcard app and is not intended for commercial use.
terms.inspiration: The project is to some extent inspired by Quizlet. However, no content is copied or used for commercial purposes.
terms.openSource: All source code is freely available and serves learning and demonstration purposes only.
terms.warranty: The application is provided as is, without warranty. There is no claim to availability, completeness, or freedom from errors.
terms.dataNotice: There is no email verification. Please do not use real passwords or personal data when registering.

login.title: Log in
login.sideText: The best way to learn and save your progress.

registration.title: Sign up
registration.sideText: The best way to learn and save your progress.
registration.newsletter: I want to receive news, promotions, updates and tips on how to use LangCards
registration.terms: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and <privacyLink>LangCards Privacy Policy</privacyLink>
registration.loginLink: Already have an account? Log in
registration.demoNotice: Learning project without email verification — please don't use real passwords or personal data.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email address you used when registering. We'll send you a link to log in and reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent you a password reset link, please check your inbox.

emailConfirmation.title: Confirm your email address to continue
emailConfirmation.message: We sent a message to {email}. Click the link in the email to confirm your account.
emailConfirmation.hint: Didn't receive an email? Check your spam folder or request another one.
emailConfirmation.successMessage: Your account is now active. You can log in.
emailConfirmation.errorMessage: The confirmation link has expired or was already used.

alreadyExist.title: Account already exists
alreadyExist.description: You already have an account with this email address. Log in using your password.
alreadyExist.switchAccount: Sign in with a different account

validation.usernameMin: Username is too short. It must be at least 3 characters.
validation.usernameLatinStart: Usernames must start with A-Z letters and cannot contain diacritic characters.
validation.usernameChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens.
validation.passwordMin: Password is too short. Minimum length is 8 characters.
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character.
validation.loginIdentifierRequired: Please enter your email or username.
validation.termsRequired: Please accept the LangCards terms of service and privacy policy to continue.

errors.sendEmail: Failed to send email. Please try again.
errors.changePassword: Failed to change password. Please try again.
errors.changeUsername: Failed to update username. Please try again.

serverErrors.invalidResetToken: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
serverErrors.invalidVerificationToken: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

hero.title: Flashcards? Flashcards!
hero.subtitle: Remember anything!
hero.description: Master any subject with interactive flashcards, practice tests and study activities.

second.label: Cards
second.title: Study your way.
second.subtitle: Whenever you want.
second.description: Create decks, add cards and learn at your own pace.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to
howItWorks.step1Description: Give it a name, choose a topic and add cards — it takes less than a minute.
howItWorks.step2Description: Enter a term and a definition. Both sides are in your hands.
howItWorks.step3Description: Flip cards, take tests, track your progress.

deleteModal.title: Delete account?
deleteModal.description: This action cannot be undone. All your decks and cards will be permanently deleted.

errors.somethingWrongMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Try refreshing the page or go back home.
errors.notFoundMessage: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.

cookies.message: This site uses only technically necessary cookies for login and session. No tracking is used.

dashboard.title: Main page
dashboard.noModules: You don't have any modules yet. Create your first one!

modules.title: My modules
modules.notFoundHint: Try a different query or create a new module

flashCard.noCardsForTest: At least 2 cards are needed for the test
flashCard.noCards: This module has no cards yet

createModule.errorIncompleteCard: Please fill in both sides of every card or remove the incomplete one.
